name: HealingAura
desc:
+1 Health Regeneration
Your Health Regeneration also applies to your allies.

name: HealingAura2
desc:
+2 Health Regeneration
Your Health Regeneration also applies to your allies.
You and your allies have uncapped HP.

name: NaturalHealer
desc: Your heals heal for 2 extra.

name: NaturalHealer2
desc:
Your heals heal for 4 extra.
Start each battle at full HP.

name: Eternal
desc: When you are downed for the 1st time each battle, take no injuries and revive with half HP.

name: Eternal2
desc: When you are downed for the 1st time each battle, take no injuries and revive with half HP, All Stats Up 2, and immediately take an extra turn.

name: Blessed
desc: Gain +1 to 2 random stats at the start of each turn.

name: Blessed2
desc: +3 Health Regeneration Gain +1 to 3 random stats at the start of each turn.

name: EvilPatron
desc:
Your healing abilities deal damage to enemies.
Gain +2 range on tile-targeted healing spells.

name: EvilPatron2
desc:
Your healing abilities deal damage to enemies.
Holy element damage you deal is doubled.
Gain +2 range on tile-targeted healing spells.

name: AngelicInspiration
desc: When you heal an ally, they also gain +2 mana.

name: AngelicInspiration2
desc: When you heal an ally, they also gain mana equal to half the amount healed.

name: TopOff
desc: When you heal another unit over their max HP, you both gain +1 [img:shield].

name: TopOff2
desc: When you heal another unit over their max HP, you both gain +2 [img:shield].

name: SharingIsCaring
desc: When you pick up a non-coin pickup, allies gain the same effects.

name: SharingIsCaring2
desc:
When you pick up a non-coin pickup, allies gain the same effects.
Start each battle with pickups nearby.

name: Caretaker
desc: When you heal another unit, heal yourself for half that amount.

name: Caretaker2
desc: When you heal another unit, heal yourself for the same amount.

name: MoraleBoost
desc: Allies gain All Stats Up whenever you kill something.

name: MoraleBoost2
desc:
Allies gain All Stats Up whenever you kill something.
When you kill something, refresh your basic attack.

name: RangedMedic
desc: Your basic attack is a ranged lobbed attack that heals allies and damages enemies.

name: RangedMedic2
desc: +2 Range. Your basic attack is a ranged lobbed attack that heals allies and damages enemies.

name: Godspeed
desc: When you heal something, gain +2 [img:spd].

name: Godspeed2
desc: When you heal something, gain +4 [img:spd] and +1 to a random stat.

name: GodWarrior
desc: When you kill an enemy, gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: GodWarrior2
desc: When you kill an enemy, gain +1 [img:divineshield] and refresh your movement action.

name: BreathOfLife
desc: When you heal a downed unit, revive it.

name: BreathOfLife2
desc: When you heal a downed unit, revive it and heal it for 3 times the number you healed.

name: ThouShaltNotKill
desc: When an enemy downs another unit, they take 10 holy damage.

name: ThouShaltNotKill2
desc: When an enemy downs another unit, they take 10 holy damage and become Stunned.

name: ThouShaltNotCovet
desc: When an enemy takes damage from an ability, it drops a random pickup.

name: ThouShaltNotCovet2
desc: When an enemy takes damage from an ability, it drops 2 random pickups.

name: BlessingOfHolyFire
desc:
Holy-element spells deal double damage to enemies instead of healing and inflict Burn 2. 
This blessing is lost when you kill a unit.

name: BlessingOfHolyFire2
desc:
Holy-element spells deal triple damage to enemies instead of healing and inflict Burn 3. 
This blessing is lost when you kill a unit.

name: AlmsForThePoor
desc: When you gain coins, all allies heal +1 HP and gain +1 [img:lck].

name: AlmsForThePoor2
desc: When you gain coins, you gain +1 [img:divineshield] and all allies heal HP and gain [img:lck] equal to the number of coins gained.

name: Purifier
desc: Your basic attack removes debuffs from allies.

name: Purifier2
desc: Your basic attack removes debuffs from allies and gives them All Stats Up.

name: VeneratedTouch
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 2 on enemies and gives +2 [img:shield] to allies.

name: VeneratedTouch2
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 3 on enemies and has a 50% chance to Stun. It also gives +3 [img:shield] to allies and a 50% chance for All Stats Up.

name: ProtectTheWeak
desc: Allies with 5 or fewer HP gain +50% dodge chance.

name: ProtectTheWeak2
desc: Allies with 10 or fewer HP gain +50% dodge chance.

name: ThouShaltObey
desc: At the end of each round, inflict Charm on a random adjacent enemy.

name: ThouShaltObey2
desc: At the end of each round, inflict Charm on the closest enemy.

name: EnchantedRelic
desc: Your trinket's passive and active effects are doubled.

name: EnchantedRelic2
desc: Your trinket's passive and active effects are tripled.

name: BlessingOfSpirit
desc: When you end your turn, you and all allies heal 2 HP and gain 2 mana. This blessing is lost when you cast a spell.

name: BlessingOfSpirit2
desc: When you end your turn, you and all allies heal 3 HP, gain 3 mana and gain +1 to 3 random stats. This blessing is lost when you cast a spell.

name: Heathens
desc: At the start of the battle, inflict Weakness 3 on all enemies.

name: Heathens2
desc: At the start of the battle, inflict Weakness 4 and Magic Weakness 4 on all enemies.
